landing.heroSubtitle: Manage projects with partners and splits, record expenses with OCR, operate across multiple currencies, and make decisions with Aria in one platform.
landing.featuresDescription: Every tool you need to record, understand and optimize the money flow of your projects

dashboard.title: Real-time project control
dashboard.description: Track balance, budget, obligations, and key movements for each project from one unified panel.

partners.title: Partners & Splits
partners.description: Set partner percentages, settle balances, and close distributions without manual calculations or external sheets.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods mapped to real cash flow
paymentMethods.description: Track where each movement comes from or goes to across card, bank transfer, cash, or account with full traceability.

ocr.title: AI OCR for receipts and invoices
ocr.description: Scan receipts and let AI prefill title, amount, date, and reference so you can register faster with fewer errors.

multiCurrency.title: Multiple currencies per project
multiCurrency.description: Operate in international scenarios and auto-convert to the project's base currency to keep financial reporting consistent.

team.title: Role-based collaboration
team.description: Invite members with project-level permissions so teams work on shared, auditable financial data.

reports.title: Exportable reports for professional closing
reports.description: Generate analysis by category, method, and period, then export results for clients, partners, or accounting workflows.

chatbot.title: Aria AI chatbot
chatbot.description: Ask about anomalies, trends, and recommendations on your financial data to speed up strategic decisions.

categories.title: Expenses and income by category
categories.description: Organize each transaction with custom categories per project. Maintain accounting clarity without complications.

history.title: Complete and traceable history
history.description: Never lose a record. Every expense, income and change is saved with date, responsible party and receipt reference.

howItWorks.title: From financial chaos to actionable control
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear workflow to configure, register, collect, and close each project using real data.

step1.title: Create your project and team
step1.description: Define the project, currency, and members in minutes so you start with a clear operational base from day one.

step2.title: Register with OCR
step2.description: Scan receipts with AI or enter movements manually to capture expenses and income without repetitive admin work.

step3.title: Manage obligations
step3.description: Track pending receivables and commitments per project to prevent cash leakage and keep operations moving.

step4.title: Close and analyze
step4.description: Consolidate reports, execute partner splits, and validate outcomes with Aria to close cycles with confidence.

speed.label: OCR reads per month on Basic

landing.ctaSubtitleFull: Start today with the Free plan — no card, no expiration date. Upgrade whenever your project needs it.

errors.noConnection: Could not connect to the server to load plans.
errors.unauthorized: Could not validate the session to load plans.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view plans.
errors.generic: Could not load plans at this time.
